creator: pusateri@bangj.com
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #33)
I have contacted the IETF and they responded that the canonical file is indeed https://data.iana.org/time-zones/data/leap-seconds.list and they won't be updating the ietf site to serve this file anymore.

The IANA file has been updated to expire on 28 June 2024.
